title: NTLA Stock Draws Bulls After Phase 3 Gene-Editing Win
text: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) stock drew bullish interest following the Phase 3 gene-editing win with lonvo-z for hereditary angioedema. The company reported that its lonvo-z therapy achieved 87% reduction in HAE attacks versus placebo with a favorable safety profile. The positive Phase 3 HAELO trial results marked a significant milestone as the first-ever Phase 3 readout for an in vivo gene-editing therapy. Multiple Wall Street analysts and market commentators turned bullish on the stock following the announcement. Citizens raised its price target for Intellia Therapeutics to $30.00 from $28.00, maintaining a Market Outperform rating. Other analysts including Chardan, Canaccord, and Leerink also raised price targets and now peg lonvo-z's success odds near 90%. Intellia's stock has surged on the momentum of these clinical achievements.
